# SBDC AI Business Resources Hub

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

The AI resources page includes AI FAQs for advising, a Small Business AI Resource Guide, AI webinars, in-person AI classes, a Quick Start Guide, and guidance on how small businesses can use AI.

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns artificial intelligence, certification, disaster readiness during Ideation, Validation, Launch and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- ## Resource type
- AI adoption and education resource hub.
- ## Best for
- Small businesses wanting to use AI for operations, marketing, productivity, decision support, customer service, finance, HR, and growth.
- ## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stages
- Launch, Operations, Growth, Recovery; also useful in Ideation/Validation for lean learning.
- ## Use when the entrepreneur says

## People and links

- Organizations: Small Business Development Center (SBDC)
- Link: <https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/AI_Business_Resources.asp>
- Link: <https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/webinars.asp>

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to Small Business Development Center (SBDC) or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
